questions.questionText: Which of the following represents the correct taxonomic hierarchy order in descending order?
options: Kingdom -> Phylum -> Class -> Order -> Family -> Genus -> Species
Kingdom -> Class -> Phylum -> Order -> Family -> Genus -> Species
Species -> Genus -> Family -> Order -> Class -> Phylum -> Kingdom
Phylum -> Class -> Order -> Family -> Genus -> Species -> Kingdom

questions.questionText: ICBN stands for which of the following terms?
In a taxonomic key, a pair of contrasting characters is referred to as a:
